{{Quote|Yakasoba... show these people what we do with Hutt operatives.|[[Nagem Dr'Lar]]|<ref name="SWG:TTE">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''</ref>}}
'''Yakasoba''' worked for [[Nagem Dr'Lar]] as part of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] salvage operation on the moon [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. When Dr'Lar was threatened at [[Death Star Salvage Site|their salvage site]] by a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] paid by [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] operative [[Osae Meilea]], Dr'Lar ordered Yakasoba to kill the spacer. The spacer defended himself and Yakasoba did not survive the fight.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Yakasoba was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]''
